channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: GOP Senators Delay Immigration Funding. And, What to Expect This Hurricane Season
item.description: Congressional Republicans left for recess without passing Trump's top immigration enforcement package. Forecasters predict fewer storms this season.

item.title: Shein Buys Everlane, Which Sold Millennials the Dream of Ethical, Affordable Luxury
item.description: Everlane's finances have struggled recently. The merger may alienate existing shoppers or attract Shein fans to trade up.

item.title: Slowing down, switching to electric, or not driving: top gas-saving strategies
item.description: With gas at $4.55 per gallon nationally ahead of a busy travel weekend, here are ways to reduce fuel costs.

item.title: Gabbard steps down as national intelligence director due to husband's cancer
item.description: Gabbard becomes the latest Trump Cabinet official to leave the administration.
